pr.title: Record: Chunk-Based N-gram Backoff + Score-First TTT (0.295 BPB)

output.summary: Chunk-synchronized order-9 N-gram cache interpolates with the model using entropy/order-adaptive mixing while score-first TTT LoRA tunes on validation chunks.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first TTT trains LoRA adapters on already-scored validation chunks during evaluation rather than standard training data.
techniques: Chunk-synchronized order-9 N-gram backoff with entropy- and order-adaptive interpolation
Score-first TTT LoRA tuning via AdamW and cosine decay on validation chunks
GPTQ int5 export to keep the weight artifact within budget
